---
title: crtools_Test          # Title of the document


execute:
  warning: false
  message: false

# Below will do html by default. To render the entire project
# Use the following code:
# quarto::quarto_render("HW2WriteUp.qmd")
format:
  html: 
    number-sections: TRUE
    code-fold: TRUE
    code-line-numbers: TRUE
    cap-location: top 
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    number-sections: TRUE
    reference-section-title: "References" 
    code-fold: TRUE
    code-line-numbers: TRUE
    cap-location: top 
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          \usepackage{amsmath}
          \usepackage[dvipsnames]{xcolor}
          \usepackage[shortlabels]{enumitem}
          \usepackage{parskip}
          \usepackage{hyperref}
          \usepackage{geometry}
          \usepackage{float}
    geometry:
      - top=0.75in
      - left=0.75in
      - bottom=0.75in
      - right=0.75in
format-links: [pdf]
---


# Loading File and showcasing ggmeansplot.R
```{r}

data(mtcars)
# set.seed(113)
set.seed(123)

# we can also use the count dataset
# data <- read.csv("../Dataset/McMillanAcheMonkeyTrips.csv")

# I used mtcars since and made artifical data instead
data <- mtcars
data$vs <- as.factor(data$vs)
data$am <- as.factor(mtcars$am)

# make a proper count outcome
data$y <- rpois(nrow(data), lambda = exp(scale(data$hp)))
data$exposure <- data$hp + 1
# add zero inflation
zero_idx <- sample(1:nrow(data), size = 5)
data$y[zero_idx] <- 0


#===========================
# cont x categorical poisson
#===========================



m1 <- fit_ct(y ~ hp * vs, data = data, family = "poisson")
ggemmeansplot(m1, pred = "hp", moderator = "vs")
emmeans(m1, ~ hp | vs, type = "response") # check if ggemeansplot give information on response scale
ggemmeansplot(m1, pred = "vs", moderator = "hp")

m2 <-  fit_ct(y ~ hp * vs, data = data, family = "negbin")
ggemmeansplot(m2, pred = "hp", moderator = "vs")

m3 <-  fit_ct(y ~ hp * vs, data = data, family = "qpoisson")
ggemmeansplot(m3, pred = "hp", moderator = "vs")


m4 <-  fit_ct(y ~ hp * vs, data = data, family = "zip")
ggemmeansplot(m4, pred = "hp", moderator = "vs")


m5 <-  fit_ct(y ~ hp * vs, data = data, family = "zinb")
ggemmeansplot(m5, pred = "hp", moderator = "vs")

ggemmeansplot(m5, pred = "vs", moderator = "hp")



# with offset one from each should be enough
m1_off <- fit_ct(
  y ~ hp * vs + offset(log(exposure)),
  data = data,
  family = "poisson"
)
ggemmeansplot(m1_off, pred = "hp", moderator = "vs")


m5_off <- fit_ct(
  y ~ hp * vs + offset(log(exposure)),
  data = data,
  family = "zinb"
)
ggemmeansplot(m5_off, pred = "hp", moderator = "vs")



# categorical x categorical

m6 <- fit_ct(y ~ vs * am, data = data, family = "poisson")
ggemmeansplot(m6, pred = "vs", moderator = "am")

m7 <- fit_ct(y ~ vs * am, data = data, family = "negbin")
ggemmeansplot(m7, pred = "vs", moderator = "am")

m8 <- fit_ct(y ~ vs * am, data = data, family = "qpoisson")
ggemmeansplot(m8, pred = "vs", moderator = "am")
  
  
m9 <-  fit_ct(y ~ vs * am, data = data, family = "zip")
ggemmeansplot(m9, pred = "vs", moderator = "am")

# I forgot the zinb case
m15 <- fit_ct(y ~ vs * am, data = data, family = "zinb")
ggemmeansplot(m15, pred = "vs", moderator = "am")



m6_off <- fit_ct(y ~ vs * am + offset(log(exposure)), data = data, family = "poisson")
ggemmeansplot(m6_off, pred = "vs", moderator = "am")



# cont vs cont

m10 <- fit_ct(y ~ hp * mpg, data = data, family = "poisson")
ggemmeansplot(m10, pred = "hp", moderator = "mpg")

m11 <- fit_ct(y ~ hp * mpg, data = data, family = "negbin")
ggemmeansplot(m11, pred = "hp", moderator = "mpg")

m12 <- fit_ct(y ~ hp * mpg, data = data, family = "qpoisson")
ggemmeansplot(m12, pred = "hp", moderator = "mpg")

m13 <- fit_ct(y ~ hp * mpg, data = data, family = "zip")
ggemmeansplot(m13, pred = "hp", moderator = "mpg")

m14 <- fit_ct(y ~ hp * mpg, data = data, family = "zinb")
ggemmeansplot(m14, pred = "hp", moderator = "mpg")



m10_off <- fit_ct(
  y ~ hp * mpg + offset(log(exposure)),
  data = data,
  family = "poisson"
)
ggemmeansplot(m10_off, pred = "hp", moderator = "mpg")

m14_off <- fit_ct(
  y ~ hp * mpg + offset(log(exposure)),
  data = data,
  family = "zinb"
)
ggemmeansplot(m14_off, pred = "hp", moderator = "mpg")



# glmer mixed effect model after 16


# cont cont
m17 <- fit_ct(y ~ hp * mpg, data = data, family = "glmpoisson")
ggemmeansplot(m17, pred = "hp", moderator = "mpg")

m18 <- fit_ct(y ~ hp * mpg, data = data, family = "glmnb")
ggemmeansplot(m18, pred = "hp", moderator = "mpg")

m17_off <- fit_ct(y ~ hp * mpg + offset(log(exposure)), data = data, family = "glmpoisson")
ggemmeansplot(m17_off, pred = "hp", moderator = "mpg")

m18_off <- fit_ct(y ~ hp * mpg + offset(log(exposure)), data = data, family = "glmnb")
ggemmeansplot(m18_off, pred = "hp", moderator = "mpg")


# cat cat
m19 <- fit_ct(y ~ vs * am, data = data, family = "glmpoisson")
ggemmeansplot(m19, pred = "vs", moderator = "am")

m20 <- fit_ct(y ~ vs * am, data = data, family = "glmnb")
ggemmeansplot(m20, pred = "vs", moderator = "am")

m19_off <- fit_ct(y ~ vs * am + offset(log(exposure)), data = data, family = "glmpoisson")
ggemmeansplot(m19_off, pred = "vs", moderator = "am")

m20_off <- fit_ct(y ~ vs * am + offset(log(exposure)), data = data, family = "glmnb")
ggemmeansplot(m20_off, pred = "vs", moderator = "am")

# cat cont

m21 <- fit_ct(y ~ hp * vs, data = data, family = "glmpoisson")
ggemmeansplot(m21, pred = "hp", moderator = "vs")

m22 <- fit_ct(y ~ hp * vs, data = data, family = "glmnb")
ggemmeansplot(m22, pred = "hp", moderator = "vs")

m21_off <- fit_ct(y ~ hp * vs + offset(log(exposure)), data = data, family = "glmpoisson")
ggemmeansplot(m21_off, pred = "hp", moderator = "vs")

m22_off <- fit_ct(y ~ hp * vs + offset(log(exposure)), data = data, family = "glmnb")
ggemmeansplot(m22_off, pred = "hp", moderator = "vs")




# refit with random effect specified
# cont cont
m17 <- fit_ct(y ~ hp * mpg + (1 | vs), data = data, family = "glmpoisson")

m18 <- fit_ct(y ~ hp * mpg + (1 | gear), data = data, family = "glmnb")

m17_off <- fit_ct(y ~ hp * mpg + (1 | gear) + offset(log(exposure)), data = data, family = "glmpoisson")

m18_off <- fit_ct(y ~ hp * mpg + (1 | gear) + offset(log(exposure)), data = data, family = "glmnb")


# cat cat
m19 <- fit_ct(y ~ vs * am + (1 | gear), data = data, family = "glmpoisson")

m20 <- fit_ct(y ~ vs * am + (1 | gear), data = data, family = "glmnb")

m19_off <- fit_ct(y ~ vs * am + (1 | gear) + offset(log(exposure)), data = data, family = "glmpoisson")

m20_off <- fit_ct(y ~ vs * am + (1 | gear) + offset(log(exposure)), data = data, family = "glmnb")

# cat cont

m21 <- fit_ct(y ~ hp * vs + (1 | gear), data = data, family = "glmpoisson")

m22 <- fit_ct(y ~ hp * vs + (1 | gear), data = data, family = "glmnb")

m21_off <- fit_ct(y ~ hp * vs + (1 | gear) + offset(log(exposure)), data = data, family = "glmpoisson")

m22_off <- fit_ct(y ~ hp * vs + (1 | gear) + offset(log(exposure)), data = data, family = "glmnb")


# working examples 


model <- fit_ct(y ~ mpg * vs + (1 | gear),
                data = data,
                family = "glmpoisson")


data2 <- read.csv("/Users/apple/Documents/GitHub/crtools/Private_Dataset/McMillanAcheMonkeyTrips.csv")

model2 <- fit_ct(Age ~ Kills*TripDays+(1|PID),
                data = data2,
                family = "glmpoisson")

t<-interp_ct(model2)

```


# Testing Emmean Text function

```{r}



mtcars$vs <- as.factor(mtcars$vs)
mtcars$am <- as.factor(mtcars$am)


em1 <- emmeans(m6, ~ vs | am,type="response")
mod.emmeans1 <- as.data.frame(em1)

em2 <- emmeans(m14_off, ~ hp | mpg)
mod.emmeans2 <- as.data.frame(em2)

cat(build_emmeans_text(
  model = m6,
  mod.emmeans = em1,
  pred = "vs",
  moderator = "am"
))

m10_off <- fit_ct(
  y ~ hp * mpg + offset(log(exposure)),
  data = data,
  family = "poisson"
)

em2 <- emmeans(m10_off, ~ hp | mpg)
mod.emmeans2 <- as.data.frame(em2)

cat(build_emmeans_text(
  model = m10_off,
  mod.emmeans = em2,
  pred = "hp",
  moderator = "mpg"
))


```



# Testing interp_ct

```{r}

#===========================
# cont x categorical poisson
#===========================


t_m1 <- interp_ct(m1)

t_m2 <- interp_ct(m2)

t_m3 <- interp_ct(m3) # error

t_m4 <- interp_ct(m4)

t_m5 <- interp_ct(m5)

t_m1_off <- interp_ct(m1_off)

t_m5_off <- interp_ct(m5_off)


#===========================
# cat x categorical poisson
#===========================

t_m6 <- interp_ct(m6)

t_m7 <- interp_ct(m7)

t_m8 <- interp_ct(m8)

t_m9 <- interp_ct(m9)

t_m15 <- interp_ct(m15)

t_m6_off <- interp_ct(m6_off)


#===========================
# cont x cont poisson
#===========================

t_m10 <- interp_ct(m10)

t_m11 <- interp_ct(m11)

t_m12 <- interp_ct(m12)

t_m13 <- interp_ct(m13)

t_m14 <- interp_ct(m14)

t_m10_off <- interp_ct(m10_off)

t_m14_off <- interp_ct(m14_off)





#===========================
# GLMER MIXED EFFECT
#===========================


#===========================
# cont x cont poisson
#===========================

t_m17 <- interp_ct(m17)
t_m18 <- interp_ct(m18)

t_m17_off <- interp_ct(m17_off)
t_m18_off <- interp_ct(m18_off)


#===========================
# cat x categorical poisson
#===========================

t_m19 <- interp_ct(m19)
t_m20 <- interp_ct(m20)

t_m19_off <- interp_ct(m19_off)
t_m20_off <- interp_ct(m20_off)

#===========================
# cont x categorical poisson
#===========================


t_m21 <- interp_ct(m21)
t_m22 <- interp_ct(m22)

t_m21_off <- interp_ct(m21_off)
t_m22_off <- interp_ct(m22_off)







        
```
```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggeffects)
library(emmeans)
library(pscl)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lmtest)
library(car)
library(carData)
library(rstatix)
library(testthat)
library(devtools)


```
```{r}



m <- fit_ct(
  y ~ hp * mpg + offset(log(exposure)),
  data = data,
  family = "poisson"
)

res <- build_emmeanscontrasts_tab(
  model = m,
  pred = "hp",
  moderator = "mpg"
)


txt <- build_emmeanscontrasts_text(
  model = m,
  mod.emmeanscontrast = res,
  pred = "hp",
  moderator = "mpg",
  alpha = 0.05
)


t <- interp_ct(m3)


```
